---
title: "Lactancia materna en Chile · Breastfeeding in Chile"
lang: es
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    theme: cosmo
---

## 🇪🇸 Español

Análisis de la **serie nacional completa 2009–2026** de lactancia materna a partir de
los Resúmenes Estadísticos Mensuales (REM-A03) del DEIS-MINSAL: armonización de 18
años de formularios, series de tiempo (STL, quiebres estructurales, series
interrumpidas COVID-19), análisis geoespacial comunal (Moran, LISA, regresión
espacial), desigualdad territorial (Gini, Theil), lactancia continuada, retención,
composición de la alimentación y brechas poblacionales.

**➡ [Etapa 4 — Análisis completo (versión en español)](stage4.html)**

## 🇬🇧 English

Analysis of the **complete 2009–2026 national series** of breastfeeding indicators
from Chile's Monthly Statistical Summaries (REM-A03, DEIS-MINSAL): harmonization of
18 years of forms, time series (STL, structural breaks, COVID-19 interrupted time
series), municipal geospatial analysis (Moran's I, LISA, spatial regression),
territorial inequality (Gini, Theil), continued breastfeeding, retention, feeding
composition, and population gaps.

**➡ [Stage 4 — Full analysis (English version)](stage4_en.html)**

---

### Análisis anteriores · Previous analyses

Las etapas 1–3 (análisis exploratorios 2019–2024, Región Metropolitana) se conservan
como scripts auxiliares en la carpeta [`other_scripts/`](https://github.com/amarusimonaguerojimenez/Breastfeeding-Chile/tree/main/other_scripts)
del repositorio. · Stages 1–3 (exploratory analyses, 2019–2024, Metropolitan Region)
are kept as auxiliary scripts in the repository's
[`other_scripts/`](https://github.com/amarusimonaguerojimenez/Breastfeeding-Chile/tree/main/other_scripts) folder.
